title: stipagrostis zeyheri subsp. macropus
intro: Stipagrostis zeyheri subsp. macropus, also known as the False Pappusgrass, is a type of grass native to the southern parts of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Stipagrostis zeyheri subsp. macropus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
